model._hint: Base: stable-diffusion-v1-5/stable-diffusion-v1-5 — SD 1.5, fine-tuned for 595k steps at 512×512 on LAION-aesthetics v2 5+. Text encoder: CLIP ViT-L/14. ~2 GB; no sequential offload needed.

generation._hint: 20–50 steps. 30 is a solid default. 50 PLMS gives maximum detail per model card evaluations. | CFG 7–8 is the sweet spot per official evaluations. Values above 10 cause oversaturation and artifacts. | Native 512×512. Larger sizes work but may produce composition distortions.

system._hint: ~2 GB peak; sequential_cpu_offload: disabled (model fits in unified memory)

notes.about: Generates general-purpose images across a wide range of subjects — portraits, landscapes, objects, and artistic styles — using the original Stable Diffusion 1.5 model.
notes.prompt_guide:
No trigger word. Use descriptive prompts with art style modifiers. Examples: 'a photorealistic portrait of a young woman, soft lighting', 'an oil painting of a mountain landscape at sunset', 'a futuristic city, cyberpunk aesthetic, neon lights, digital art'.

Negative prompt: Example: 'blurry, low quality, distorted, ugly, watermark, text'.
